template_data.headline_html: What changes when you pick the right door.

image_headline: THE WRONG DOOR COSTS YOU MONTHS
image_prompt: Split-panel infographic, horizontal layout. Top half cream background: bold dark-navy label 'WRONG VEHICLE' with red X icon, three short stacked labels: 'WRONG LANE', 'ZERO TRACTION', 'STALLED'. Illustrated professional in business casual standing in front of a closed dark door, expression flat and frustrated. Bottom half dark navy: bold white label 'RIGHT VEHICLE' with green checkmark icon, three short stacked labels: 'CORRECT SIN', '3 RFQS', 'PIPELINE LIVE'. Same illustrated professional opening a glowing green-framed door with confidence. Bold headline centered across both panels in large caps: 'THE WRONG DOOR COSTS YOU MONTHS'. Thin horizontal dividing line between panels. Footer text: 'Jason · GSA Focus'.
